Experiment 1 — Coherence vs Noise Threshold

Does coherence collapse at a predictable threshold as noise increases?

Coherence drops sharply at σ ≈ 0.061, confirming threshold behavior. Below this noise level, the Δ metric maintains structural sensitivity. Above it, signal degrades into noise.
